actors.text: Test whether SipStation A and B have DIFFERENT mean volumes. Pick the hypotheses.
H0: mu_A = mu_B ; Ha: mu_A != mu_B
H0: mu_A != mu_B ; Ha: mu_A = mu_B
actors.reflection: The NULL hypothesis always states no effect / equality. Swap the roles -- H0 is the equality.

actors.text: H0: mu_A = mu_B ; Ha: mu_A > mu_B
actors.reflection: The question asks whether means are DIFFERENT -- this is two-sided (!=), not one-sided (>).

completion.rule: any correct QuestionDoor switch pressed by >= 1/3 of online players, then any Player walks onto Goal
